parameters: It's a really old chest. It's sealed shut by a bed of grass and moss.
It's a really old chest. It's locked with a complicated seal,
but you know how to open it.
Those two's adventure is connected to the present day.
I'm sorry, but the tower isn't accessible right now.
We deeply apologize for any inconvenience."
I'm sorry, but the tower isn't accessible right now.
It's dangerous inside the tower! A bunch of armed people showed
up and started trying to take over!
The Magic Cannon is sealed and can no longer be used by anyone.
For them to attack regardless... They must be desperate.
The man's passed out. Looks like he was the real guard.
"Mankind defeated the Demon Lord and tore down his castle.
This display contains one of the few artifacts that remain."
